result.text:
Ever tried minting an NFT during a drop, only to get stuck in an endless loop of waiting? Yeah, we’ve all been there. 😩⏳

https://t.co/yG9fI46Sct

That’s why everyone’s excited about what Somnia brings to the table. 🎉

⚡ 300,000 mints per second
⏱ Mean latency just over 1s (yes, really!)
🛠 No custom tweaks needed

NFTs should be fun, not frustrating. With Somnia, they finally are. 🚀✨

#NFTs #Web3 #Somnia #Scalability
